channel.title: Sky Podcast
channel.description: Audio versions of interesting articles converted to MP3 for easy listening
channel.itunes:author: Sky
channel.itunes:summary: Audio versions of interesting articles converted to MP3 for easy listening

item.title: The Adolescence of Technology - Dario Amodei
item.description: Audio version of Dario Amodei's essay "The Adolescence of Technology" from darioamodei.com. This essay explores the risks and challenges of powerful AI systems, including autonomy risks, misuse for destruction, economic disruption, and the path forward for humanity.
item.itunes:subtitle: Audio version of Dario Amodei's essay on AI risks and humanity's technological adolescence
item.itunes:summary: Audio version of Dario Amodei's essay "The Adolescence of Technology" - exploring AI risks including autonomy, bioweapons, authoritarianism, economic disruption, and unknown unknowns.
